channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Malema rejects blaming African migrants for South Africa’s unemployment and service delivery crisis
item.description: Economic Freedom Fighters (EFF) leader Julius Malema has strongly pushed back against growing anti-immigrant sentiment in South Africa, arguing that poor African migrants are being unfairly blamed for...

item.title: Tristan Thompson Talks Vasectomy and Family Planning with Khloé Kardashian
item.description: NBA star Tristan Thompson recently opened up about undergoing a vasectomy, revealing that the decision was influenced in part by discussions with his ex-partner Khloé Kardashian. The pair broke up in ...

item.title: Tanzania Parliament Recognizes President Samia’s Contribution to Sports Achievements
item.description: In a recent parliamentary session held in Dodoma, Tanzania’s MPs formally recognized President Samia Suluhu Hassan for her notable contributions to sports development in the country. The motion, led b...

item.title: Marmite: health benefits and cautions of a divisive favourite
item.description: Marmite, the long-standing British yeast extract spread, is examined for its nutritional profile and potential health benefits. The article outlines Marmite’s origin, noting its production in Burton-u...

item.title: Pritty Vishy criticises women representatives over response to Utumishi Girls Academy fire tragedy
item.description: Content creator and influencer Pritty Vishy has publicly criticised Kenya’s women representatives over what she describes as their silence following the tragic fire at Utumishi Girls Academy in Gilgil...

item.title: Federal judge temporarily halts Trump administration's $1.776 billion compensation fund plan
item.description: A federal judge has temporarily blocked the Trump administration from moving forward with a proposed $1.776 billion compensation program known as the “Anti-Weaponization Fund,” which was intended to c...

item.title: European Datacenter Growth Risks Straining Water and Energy Resources, Report Warns
item.description: A new report by Grundfos highlights the growing pressures Europe faces from the rapid expansion of datacenters across the continent. Currently, server farms consume around 10 GW of power, expected to ...

item.title: Critics slam Byron Allen's 'Comics Unleashed' as CBS replaces Stephen Colbert
item.description: CBS recently replaced Stephen Colbert's long-running 'The Late Show' with Byron Allen's 'Comics Unleashed,' a syndicated half-hour comedy program for which Allen reportedly pays the network $15 millio...

item.title: China's Defence Minister Absents from Shangri-La Dialogue as US Heads Key Security Forum
item.description: In a notable development reflecting China's growing confidence on the global stage, Chinese leaders have decided to skip the prestigious Shangri-La Dialogue defence summit in Singapore. The event, whi...

item.title: House prosecution team confirms 25 witnesses for VP Sara Duterte impeachment case
item.description: The House prosecution panel has confirmed that it is preparing around 25 witnesses for the impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte, according to lead prosecutor Batangas 2nd District Represen...

item.title: Mika Brzezinski becomes emotional during ICE detention discussion on MS NOW, Sen. Cory Booker responds
item.description: During a broadcast of MS NOW’s “Morning Joe,” co-host Mika Brzezinski became visibly emotional while discussing reported conditions in U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) detention faciliti...

item.title: US and Iran move closer to ceasefire extension and preliminary framework deal amid ongoing conflict talks
item.description: The United States and Iran have reportedly made significant but still incomplete progress towards a possible agreement aimed at de-escalating their ongoing conflict. According to sources cited in the ...

item.title: Jumia names Akinwumi Adesina to supervisory board to strengthen governance and profitability drive
item.description: Jumia Technologies, the NYSE-listed African e-commerce company, has announced the appointment of Dr. Akinwumi Adesina, former President of the African Development Bank (AfDB), into its supervisory boa...

item.title: Saint John police arrest robbery suspect over a year after store theft
item.description: Saint John police have successfully arrested a suspect in connection with a robbery that occurred over a year ago at a local store in New Brunswick. The investigation had been ongoing since the incide...

item.title: Young Australians face recurring redundancies in creative industries
item.description: In 2026, job insecurity is increasingly common in Australia's creative and knowledge sectors, particularly affecting young professionals. Connor Parissis, a PR professional in his twenties, recounts b...

item.title: HONOR 600 Series launches nationwide in South Africa with AI features and flagship hardware
item.description: HONOR South Africa has officially announced the nationwide availability of its new HONOR 600 Series, which includes the HONOR 600 and HONOR 600 Pro. The launch positions the devices as premium smartph...

item.title: EFInA Organises Consumer Protection Dialogues in Katsina LGAs, Benefits Over 1,000 Residents
item.description: EFInA through their Inclusion for All (I4All) initiative don successfully complete consumer protection sensitisation programmes for people for Mani and Malumfashi Local Government Areas for Katsina St...

item.title: Holly Madison’s career transition and estimated $16 million net worth after leaving the Playboy Mansion
item.description: Holly Madison, formerly known for her role as one of Hugh Hefner’s partners on the reality show The Girls Next Door, has built a successful independent career after leaving the Playboy Mansion in 2008...

item.title: Rahul Gandhi interacts with auto-rickshaw drivers in Delhi, discusses livelihood challenges
item.description: Congress leader and Leader of Opposition in Parliament, Rahul Gandhi, was seen interacting with a group of auto-rickshaw drivers in Delhi on Friday afternoon. As per reports and visuals shared by news...

item.title: Henry Mwinuka reaches BAL final with Rwanda’s RSSB Tigers after historic run
item.description: Tanzanian basketball coach Henry Mwinuka is on the verge of making big history in African basketball as he leads Rwanda’s RSSB Tigers into the Basketball Africa League (BAL) final. The final match is ...
